GlobalSettings.title: Global Settings
GlobalSettings.description: App-wide system settings maintained by the admins including profile image, welcome message, and rotating API keys.

profileImageUrl.description: URL of the Al-Moalem's profile picture stored on Cloudinary.

welcomeMessage.description: Arabic welcome message spoken by الأستاذ دالي.

geminiKeys.description: List of active Gemini API keys for round-robin or question-based rotating balance.

ChatSession.title: Chat Session
ChatSession.description: A conversation thread initiated by a student to interact with Al-Moalem DZ.

ChatMessage.title: Chat Message
ChatMessage.description: A single entry in a chat session thread, either from the student or Al-Moalem.

imageUrl.description: Optional Cloudinary uploaded image URL attached to the message.

/sessions/{sessionId}/messages/{messageI.description: Individual messages under a specific conversation.
